title: Lagos NIPR Congratulates Godfrey Adejumoh on New Role at Diageo - FinancialEDGE
description: The Lagos Chapter of the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR) has extended its congratulations to Godfrey Adejumoh on his appointment as Head, Corporate Relations for West & Central Africa at Diageo. html:
The Lagos Chapter of the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR) has extended its congratulations to Godfrey Adejumoh on his appointment as Head, Corporate Relations for West & Central Africa at Diageo.

The Chapter praised Adejumoh’s professionalism, strategic acumen, and commitment to excellence in the field of public relations, noting that his elevation is a source of pride for the PR community in Lagos.

The Chairman of the Lagos NIPR, Dr. Samuel Ayetutu, described the appointment as “a brilliant reflection of the calibre of professionals within our ranks and an inspiration to upcoming practitioners in the industry.”

The Chapter emphasized that Adejumoh’s achievement reaffirms the relevance and global impact of Nigerian PR practitioners.

The Lagos NIPR wishes Adejumoh continued success and greater accomplishments in his new role. The appointment is seen as a testament to Adejumoh’s hard work and dedication to the field of public relations.
